title: Testcases nhom Quan tri (Don vi, Chuc vu, Nguoi dung, Nhom quyen)

testcases.title: Hien thi cay co cau to chuc va bang danh sach
testcases.preconditions: Da dang nhap voi quyen admin. He thong co it nhat 1 don vi va 1 phong ban.
steps: Truy cap menu Quan tri > Don vi
Quan sat layout 2 cot: cay ben trai, bang ben phai
testcases.expected: Cay don vi hien thi day du cap. Bang ben phai hien thi tat ca don vi/phong ban khi chua chon node nao. Tieu de trang 'Quan ly don vi' xuat hien.

testcases.title: Cot bang hien thi day du Ma, Ten, Cap, So NV, Trang thai
testcases.preconditions: Co data don vi va phong ban
testcases.expected: Bang hien thi 5 cot: Ma (in dam navy), Ten, Cap (the xanh teal/navy), So NV, Trang thai (Hoat dong xanh / Da khoa do)

testcases.title: Click node tren cay loc bang ben phai
testcases.preconditions: Cay co cau co nhieu don vi
steps: Click chon 1 don vi tren cay trai
testcases.expected: Bang chi hien thi phong ban con cap 1 va cap 2 cua don vi vua chon

testcases.title: Tim kiem don vi tren cay theo ten
steps: Nhap ten don vi vao o tim kiem cay
testcases.expected: Cay tu loc highlight cac node match ten tim kiem

testcases.title: Nut Tai lai cay don vi hoat dong
steps: Click nut Tai lai goc phai card cay
testcases.expected: He thong goi lai API tai cay, hien thi trang thai loading roi update lai data

testcases.title: Them don vi cap cao (cap Don vi) thanh cong
steps: Bo trong Don vi cha (de tao goc)
testcases.expected: Drawer dong, message 'Them thanh cong'. Don vi moi xuat hien tren cay voi the xanh teal 'Don vi'

testcases.title: Them phong ban con thanh cong (chon don vi cha)
steps: Tren cay trai click chon don vi 'So Test 001'
Quan sat truong Don vi cha
testcases.expected: Truong Don vi cha tu dong gan = So Test 001. Sau khi luu, phong ban con xuat hien duoi don vi cha tren cay

testcases.title: Them don vi voi day du truong tuy chon (Email, SDT, Fax, Dia chi, Mo ta)
steps: Nhap Ma: 'FULL_TEST', Ten: 'Don vi day du'
Dia chi: '123 Pho Hue, Ha Noi'
Bat Switch 'Cho phep so van ban'
testcases.expected: Luu thanh cong, tat ca cac truong duoc luu va hien thi dung khi mo Sua

testcases.title: Bo trong Ma -> hien thi loi inline 'Nhap ma'
testcases.expected: Loi inline tai truong Ma: 'Nhap ma'. Drawer khong dong, khong goi API

testcases.title: Bo trong Ten -> hien thi loi inline 'Nhap ten'
testcases.expected: Loi inline tai truong Ten: 'Nhap ten'

testcases.title: Trung Ma don vi -> hien thi loi inline 'Ma don vi da ton tai'
testcases.preconditions: Da co don vi voi Ma 'SO_TEST'
steps: Nhap Ma: 'SO_TEST', Ten: 'Don vi trung ma'
testcases.expected: Loi inline tai truong Ma: 'Ma don vi da ton tai'. Drawer khong dong

testcases.title: Email sai dinh dang -> 'Email khong hop le'
testcases.expected: Loi inline tai Email: 'Email khong hop le'

testcases.title: SDT chua chu cai -> 'So dien thoai khong hop le'
testcases.expected: Loi inline tai SDT: 'So dien thoai khong hop le'

testcases.title: Fax chua ky tu khong hop le -> 'So fax khong hop le'
testcases.expected: Loi inline tai Fax: 'So fax khong hop le'

testcases.title: Ma vuot 50 ky tu -> bi cat hoac bao loi
testcases.expected: Input bi maxLength=50 chan, chi luu duoc 50 ky tu dau

testcases.title: Ten don vi 200 ky tu (max) -> luu OK
testcases.expected: Luu thanh cong, ten 200 ky tu duoc luu day du

testcases.title: Dia chi 500 ky tu (max) -> luu OK
steps: Nhap Dia chi: chuoi 500 ky tu
testcases.expected: Luu thanh cong

testcases.title: Mo ta 500 ky tu (max) -> luu OK voi bo dem
testcases.expected: TextArea hien thi bo dem 500/500. Luu OK

testcases.title: Sua ten don vi thanh cong
steps: Click menu ba cham, chon 'Sua thong tin'
Doi Ten thanh 'Don vi sua ten'
testcases.expected: Drawer dong, message 'Cap nhat thanh cong'. Bang refresh hien ten moi

testcases.title: Sua Ma sang ma da co o don vi khac -> 'Ma don vi da ton tai'
testcases.preconditions: Co 2 don vi: A (ma A1) va B (ma B1)
testcases.expected: Loi inline tai Ma: 'Ma don vi da ton tai'

testcases.title: Khoa don vi -> trang thai chuyen sang Da khoa
testcases.preconditions: Co don vi dang Hoat dong
testcases.expected: Message 'Da khoa'. Cot Trang thai chuyen sang 'Da khoa' mau do. Menu xuat hien tuy chon 'Mo khoa'

testcases.title: Mo khoa don vi -> tro lai Hoat dong
steps: Click menu ba cham, chon 'Mo khoa'
testcases.expected: Message 'Da mo khoa'. Cot Trang thai sang 'Hoat dong' mau xanh

testcases.title: Xoa don vi rong (khong co con, khong co NV) thanh cong
testcases.preconditions: Don vi rong khong co phong ban con va khong co nhan vien
steps: Modal hien 'Ban co chac chan muon xoa don vi nay?'
testcases.expected: Message 'Xoa thanh cong'. Don vi bien mat khoi cay va bang

testcases.title: Xoa don vi con phong ban con -> 'Khong the xoa: con N phong ban con'
testcases.preconditions: Don vi A co 2 phong ban con
steps: Mo menu ba cham don vi A, chon 'Xoa'
testcases.expected: Message loi: 'Khong the xoa: con 2 phong ban con'. Don vi van con tren cay

testcases.title: Xoa don vi con nhan vien -> 'Khong the xoa: con N nhan vien thuoc phong ban nay'
testcases.preconditions: Phong ban X co 3 nhan vien
steps: Click menu ba cham phong ban X, chon 'Xoa'
testcases.expected: Message loi: 'Khong the xoa: con 3 nhan vien thuoc phong ban nay'

testcases.title: Click Huy trong modal -> dong modal, khong xoa
testcases.expected: Modal dong, don vi van ton tai

testcases.title: User khong phai admin -> khong truy cap duoc menu Quan tri > Don vi
testcases.preconditions: Dang nhap voi user vai tro 'Chuyen vien' (khong co quyen admin)
steps: Mo sidebar, tim menu Quan tri
testcases.expected: Menu Quan tri an hoan toan. Truy cap truc tiep URL /quan-tri/don-vi -> redirect 403 hoac trang error

testcases.title: Cap = Don vi -> bat duoc Switch 'Cho phep so van ban'
steps: Bat Switch 'Cho phep so van ban'
testcases.expected: Switch chuyen sang ON. Khi luu, don vi co kha nang cau hinh so van ban

testcases.title: Thu tu nhap so am -> bi chan hoac fallback ve 0
testcases.expected: InputNumber khong cho nhap so am hoac tu reset ve 0

testcases.title: Click Huy o header drawer -> dong drawer khong luu
testcases.preconditions: Drawer Them dang mo, da nhap mot phan du lieu
testcases.expected: Drawer dong, du lieu khong duoc luu, bang khong thay doi

testcases.title: Hien thi bang chuc vu day du cot
testcases.preconditions: Da dang nhap admin, co data chuc vu
steps: Truy cap menu Quan tri > Chuc vu
testcases.expected: Bang hien thi 7 cot: Ma, Ten chuc vu, Thu tu, So NV, Lanh dao (Co/Khong), XL Van ban (Co/Khong), Trang thai. Header card co tieu de 'Danh sach chuc vu'

testcases.title: Phan trang chuc vu va chon so dong/trang
steps: Quan sat thanh phan trang cuoi bang
testcases.expected: Bang reload voi 20 dong/trang, tong so ban ghi hien thi dung

testcases.title: Tim kiem theo tu khoa hoat dong
steps: Nhap 'Truong phong' vao o tim kiem header card
testcases.expected: Bang loc, hien chi cac chuc vu match 'Truong phong'

testcases.title: Them chuc vu thanh cong voi truong toi thieu
steps: Nhap Ten chuc vu: 'Test chuc vu'
testcases.expected: Drawer dong, message 'Them thanh cong'. Chuc vu xuat hien tren bang voi mac dinh: Lanh dao=Khong, XL VB=Co, Trang thai=Hoat dong

testcases.title: Them chuc vu lanh dao (bat Switch 'Chuc vu lanh dao')
testcases.expected: Luu OK. Cot Lanh dao tren bang hien 'Co' xanh

testcases.title: Them chuc vu khong xu ly van ban (tat Switch XL VB)
steps: Tat Switch 'Duoc xu ly van ban'
testcases.expected: Luu OK. Cot XL Van ban tren bang hien 'Khong' xam. Khi van thu phan cong van ban, chuc vu nay khong xuat hien trong Select

testcases.title: Bo trong Ten chuc vu -> 'Nhap ten chuc vu'
testcases.expected: Loi inline tai Ten: 'Nhap ten chuc vu'

testcases.title: Bo trong Ma -> 'Nhap ma'
testcases.expected: Loi inline tai Ma: 'Nhap ma'

testcases.title: Trung Ma chuc vu -> 'Ma chuc vu da ton tai'
testcases.expected: Loi inline tai Ma: 'Ma chuc vu da ton tai'

testcases.title: Ma vuot 20 ky tu -> bi cat
testcases.expected: Input maxLength=20, chi cho nhap 20 ky tu

testcases.title: Ten chuc vu 100 ky tu (max) -> luu OK
testcases.expected: Luu thanh cong, du 100 ky tu

testcases.title: Mo ta 500 ky tu (max) -> luu OK
testcases.expected: TextArea hien bo dem 500/500. Luu OK

testcases.title: Sua chuc vu doi Switch Lanh dao -> luu OK
steps: Click menu ba cham, 'Sua thong tin'
testcases.expected: Message 'Cap nhat thanh cong'. Cot Lanh dao tren bang chuyen sang Co

testcases.title: Sua Ma trung voi chuc vu khac -> 'Ma chuc vu da ton tai'
testcases.preconditions: Co 2 chuc vu A (ma A1), B (ma B1)
steps: Sua chuc vu B, doi Ma thanh 'A1'
testcases.expected: Loi inline tai Ma: 'Ma chuc vu da ton tai'

testcases.title: Doi Trang thai sang Ngung -> chuc vu khong xuat hien trong Select gan nhan vien
testcases.preconditions: Co chuc vu 'Cu nhan tap su'
steps: Sua chuc vu, tat Switch Trang thai
Vao Quan tri > Nguoi dung > Drawer Them, mo Select Chuc vu
testcases.expected: Chuc vu 'Cu nhan tap su' khong xuat hien trong dropdown Chuc vu

testcases.title: Xoa chuc vu khong co nhan vien -> thanh cong
testcases.preconditions: Co chuc vu rong khong nhan vien
testcases.expected: Message 'Xoa thanh cong'. Chuc vu bien mat

testcases.title: Xoa chuc vu con nhan vien -> 'Khong the xoa: con N nhan vien dang su dung chuc vu nay'
testcases.preconditions: Chuc vu 'Truong phong' co 5 nhan vien
steps: Mo menu ba cham, chon Xoa
testcases.expected: Loi: 'Khong the xoa: con 5 nhan vien dang su dung chuc vu nay'

testcases.title: Switch Trang thai mac dinh = Hoat dong
testcases.expected: Switch ON, label 'Hoat dong'

testcases.title: Switch 'Duoc xu ly van ban' mac dinh = Co
steps: Quan sat Switch 'Duoc xu ly van ban'
testcases.expected: Switch ON, mac dinh Co

testcases.title: User khong admin -> khong vao duoc
testcases.expected: Redirect 403 hoac an menu

testcases.title: Layout 2 cot: cay don vi trai, bang nguoi dung phai
steps: Truy cap Quan tri > Nguoi dung
testcases.expected: Cay don vi/phong ban ben trai voi o tim kiem va nut Tai lai. Bang ben phai co thanh loc va bang phan trang

testcases.title: Cot bang day du: Anh, Ho ten, Ma NV, Username, Chuc vu, Phong ban, Email, SDT, Trang thai
testcases.expected: 9 cot hien thi dung. Cot SDT hien 2 dong: phone bold + di dong xam nho

testcases.title: Cot SDT hien dau gach khi ca 2 deu trong
testcases.preconditions: Co user khong nhap SDT va di dong
steps: Quan sat cot SDT cua user do
testcases.expected: Hien dau '—'

testcases.title: Click node phong ban tren cay -> loc bang ben phai
testcases.preconditions: Co cay phong ban va nguoi dung
testcases.expected: Bang loc chi nhung user thuoc phong ban do

testcases.title: Tim kiem theo ho ten / username
testcases.expected: Bang loc, hien chi user 'Nguyen Van A'

testcases.title: Loc theo trang thai = Hoat dong
testcases.preconditions: Co user Hoat dong va Da khoa
testcases.expected: Bang chi hien user Hoat dong

testcases.title: Loc theo trang thai = Da khoa
testcases.expected: Bang chi hien user Da khoa

testcases.title: Them user thanh cong voi truong bat buoc
testcases.preconditions: Drawer Them mo, co don vi va phong ban san
steps: Don vi: chon So Noi Vu
Phong ban: chon Phong Hanh chinh
testcases.expected: Drawer dong, message 'Them thanh cong'. User moi xuat hien trong bang

testcases.title: Them user khong nhap mat khau -> mac dinh Admin@123
steps: Nhap day du truong bat buoc, BO TRONG mat khau
testcases.expected: User tao thanh cong. Test login bang Admin@123 OK

testcases.title: Them user voi day du 13 truong
steps: Dien tat ca cac truong: Username, mat khau, ho ten dem, ten, email, SDT, di dong, don vi, phong ban, chuc vu, gioi tinh, ngay sinh, dia chi
testcases.expected: Luu OK, mo Sua thay du lieu day du

testcases.title: Da chon phong ban tren cay -> mo Drawer Them tu gan Don vi + Phong ban
testcases.preconditions: Click chon 'Phong Hanh chinh' tren cay trai
testcases.expected: Truong Don vi va Phong ban da co san gia tri tuong ung voi node da chon

testcases.title: Bo trong Username -> 'Nhap ten dang nhap'
steps: Bo trong username, dien cac truong khac
testcases.expected: Loi inline: 'Nhap ten dang nhap'

testcases.title: Username < 3 ky tu -> 'Toi thieu 3 ky tu'
testcases.expected: Loi inline tai Username: 'Toi thieu 3 ky tu'

testcases.title: Username chua khoang trang -> 'Chi chua chu cai, so, dau cham, gach ngang'
testcases.expected: Loi inline: 'Chi chua chu cai, so, dau cham, gach ngang'

testcases.title: Username chua ky tu dac biet @# -> bao loi format
testcases.expected: Loi inline format username

testcases.title: Username trung -> 'Ten dang nhap da ton tai'
steps: Dien du truong khac, Click Them moi
testcases.expected: Loi inline tai Username: 'Ten dang nhap da ton tai'

testcases.title: Mat khau < 6 ky tu -> 'Toi thieu 6 ky tu'
testcases.expected: Loi inline: 'Toi thieu 6 ky tu'

testcases.title: Mat khau khong co chu hoa -> 'Phai chua chu hoa, chu thuong va so'
testcases.expected: Loi inline: 'Phai chua chu hoa, chu thuong va so'

testcases.title: Mat khau khong co chu thuong -> bao loi
testcases.expected: Loi: 'Phai chua chu hoa, chu thuong va so'

testcases.title: Mat khau khong co so -> bao loi
testcases.expected: Loi: 'Phai chua chu hoa, chu thuong va so'

testcases.title: Bo trong Ho va ten dem -> 'Nhap ho va ten dem'
steps: Bo trong Ho va ten dem
testcases.expected: Loi inline: 'Nhap ho va ten dem'

testcases.title: Bo trong Ten -> 'Nhap ten'
testcases.expected: Loi inline tai Ten: 'Nhap ten'

testcases.title: Email sai dinh dang -> 'Email khong hop le'
testcases.expected: Loi inline tai Email: 'Email khong hop le'

testcases.title: Email trung user khac -> 'Email da duoc su dung'
testcases.expected: Loi inline tai Email: 'Email da duoc su dung'

testcases.title: SDT < 8 ky tu -> 'So dien thoai khong dung dinh dang'
testcases.expected: Loi inline tai SDT

testcases.title: SDT > 15 ky tu -> bao loi
testcases.expected: Loi inline tai SDT

testcases.title: SDT chua chu cai -> bao loi
testcases.expected: Loi inline format SDT

testcases.title: Di dong sai dinh dang -> 'So di dong khong dung dinh dang'
testcases.expected: Loi inline tai Di dong

testcases.title: Bo trong Don vi -> 'Chon don vi'
testcases.expected: Loi inline tai Don vi: 'Chon don vi'

testcases.title: Bo trong Phong ban -> 'Chon phong ban'
testcases.preconditions: Drawer Them mo, da chon Don vi
testcases.expected: Loi inline tai Phong ban: 'Chon phong ban'

testcases.title: Doi Don vi -> Phong ban tu reset va load lai theo don vi moi
testcases.preconditions: Drawer Them, da chon Don vi A va Phong ban X cua A
testcases.expected: Truong Phong ban tu reset (clear), Select Phong ban load lai danh sach phong ban thuoc Don vi B

testcases.title: Username 50 ky tu (max) -> luu OK
steps: Dien du truong, Click Them moi
testcases.expected: Luu thanh cong

testcases.title: Ho va ten dem 50 ky tu (max) -> luu OK
steps: Ho va ten dem 50 ky tu
testcases.expected: Luu OK

testcases.title: Dia chi 500 ky tu (max) -> luu OK voi bo dem
testcases.expected: Hien bo dem 500/500. Luu OK

testcases.title: Mac dinh Gioi tinh = Nam
testcases.expected: Radio 'Nam' duoc check san

testcases.title: DatePicker Ngay sinh dung dinh dang dd/MM/yyyy
testcases.expected: DatePicker mo, format dd/MM/yyyy

testcases.title: Mo Drawer Sua -> Username bi disable
steps: Click menu ba cham, 'Sua thong tin'
testcases.expected: Username hien gia tri hien tai nhung disabled (xam, khong nhap duoc)

testcases.title: Drawer Sua khong co truong Mat khau
testcases.expected: Khong co o nhap Mat khau (chi co o Drawer Them)

testcases.title: Sua email user -> luu OK
steps: Doi email thanh email moi hop le va chua trung
testcases.expected: Message 'Cap nhat thanh cong'. Bang refresh hien email moi

testcases.title: Sua email trung user khac -> 'Email da duoc su dung'
testcases.preconditions: Co 2 user A va B; A co email a@dft.vn
steps: Sua user B, doi email thanh 'a@dft.vn'
testcases.expected: Loi inline tai Email: 'Email da duoc su dung'

testcases.title: Sua user thay doi don vi/phong ban
testcases.preconditions: User dang thuoc Don vi A / Phong ban X
steps: Sua, doi Don vi sang B, Phong ban sang Y
testcases.expected: Luu OK. User chuyen sang Don vi B / Phong ban Y, hien thi dung tren bang

testcases.title: Khoa tai khoan -> trang thai Da khoa
steps: Click menu ba cham, 'Khoa tai khoan'
testcases.expected: Message 'Da khoa'. User chuyen Trang thai = Da khoa do. User do khong dang nhap duoc

testcases.title: Mo khoa tai khoan -> Hoat dong tro lai
steps: Click menu ba cham, 'Mo khoa tai khoan'
testcases.expected: Message 'Da mo khoa'. User dang nhap duoc binh thuong

testcases.title: Mo Drawer Phan quyen -> tieu de hien Ho ten user
testcases.expected: Drawer mo (480px), tieu de 'Phan quyen: Nguyen Van A'. Hien thi danh sach nhom quyen dang card

testcases.title: Tich chon nhom quyen -> card doi mau xanh teal
steps: Click vao card 'Quan tri he thong'
testcases.expected: Card co nen xanh nhat, vien xanh teal, checkbox tick

testcases.title: Luu phan quyen thanh cong
testcases.preconditions: Drawer Phan quyen mo, da tich 2 nhom quyen
steps: Click nut Luu o header drawer
testcases.expected: Drawer dong, message 'Luu phan quyen thanh cong'

testcases.title: Mo lai Drawer -> nhom quyen da gan duoc tich san
testcases.preconditions: User da co nhom quyen 'Quan tri'
testcases.expected: Card 'Quan tri' co tick va nen xanh teal

testcases.title: Bo tat ca nhom quyen -> luu OK, user khong con quyen
testcases.expected: Luu OK. Reload, user khong co nhom quyen nao

testcases.title: Reset mat khau ve Admin@123 thanh cong
steps: Modal hien 'Mat khau cua "Nguyen Van A" se duoc dat ve mac dinh (Admin@123)?'
testcases.expected: Message 'Da reset mat khau'. User dang nhap voi Admin@123 thanh cong

testcases.title: Click Huy modal -> dong, khong reset
testcases.expected: Modal dong, mat khau cu giu nguyen

testcases.title: Xoa user chua xu ly van ban -> thanh cong
testcases.preconditions: User khong co lich su xu ly
steps: Modal hien 'Ban co chac chan muon xoa "Nguyen Van A"?'
testcases.expected: Message 'Xoa thanh cong'. User bien mat khoi bang

testcases.title: Xoa user co lich su -> nen Khoa thay vi xoa (warning hoac error)
testcases.preconditions: User da xu ly van ban
steps: Menu ba cham, 'Xoa nguoi dung', Click Xoa
testcases.expected: Loi: 'Loi khi xoa' hoac chinh xac thong bao FK. Khuyen cao Khoa tai khoan thay vi Xoa

testcases.title: User khong admin -> khong vao duoc
testcases.expected: An menu hoac redirect 403

testcases.title: Hien thi bang nhom quyen voi cot Ten nhom, Mo ta, So nguoi dung, Ngay tao
steps: Truy cap menu Quan tri > Nhom quyen
testcases.expected: Bang co 4 cot. Cot So nguoi dung hien dang the xanh. Ngay tao format dd/MM/yyyy

testcases.title: Header card co tieu de 'Danh sach nhom quyen' va nut Them
testcases.expected: Trai: tieu de + dong mo ta. Phai: o tim kiem + nut 'Them nhom quyen'

testcases.title: Tim kiem theo tu khoa
steps: Nhap 'Van thu' vao o tim kiem
testcases.expected: Bang loc, hien chi nhom 'Van thu'

testcases.title: Phan trang voi tong so ban ghi
testcases.expected: Hien total + page size selector. Doi page size hoat dong

testcases.title: Them nhom quyen toi thieu (chi ten) thanh cong
testcases.expected: Drawer dong, message 'Them thanh cong'. Nhom moi xuat hien tren bang voi So nguoi dung = 0

testcases.title: Them nhom quyen day du (ten + mo ta)
steps: Ten nhom quyen: 'Quan ly van thu'
Mo ta: 'Vai tro xu ly van ban den di hang ngay'
testcases.expected: Luu OK. Mo ta hien thi tren bang

testcases.title: Bo trong Ten nhom quyen -> 'Nhap ten nhom quyen'
testcases.expected: Loi inline tai Ten: 'Nhap ten nhom quyen'

testcases.title: Trung Ten nhom quyen -> 'Ten nhom quyen da ton tai'
testcases.expected: Loi inline tai Ten: 'Ten nhom quyen da ton tai'

testcases.title: Ten nhom quyen 100 ky tu (max) -> luu OK
testcases.expected: Luu thanh cong

testcases.title: Mo ta 500 ky tu (max) -> luu OK
testcases.expected: TextArea hien 500/500. Luu OK

testcases.title: Sua mo ta nhom quyen thanh cong
testcases.expected: Message 'Cap nhat thanh cong'. Mo ta moi hien tren bang

testcases.title: Sua Ten trung voi nhom khac -> 'Ten nhom quyen da ton tai'
steps: Sua nhom B, doi Ten thanh ten cua A
testcases.expected: Loi inline: 'Ten nhom quyen da ton tai'

testcases.title: Mo Drawer Phan quyen -> hien cay chuc nang voi checkbox
testcases.expected: Drawer 720px, tieu de 'Phan quyen: Quan tri'. Cay menu cha-con-hanh dong, mac dinh mo rong tat ca

testcases.title: Tich menu cha -> menu con tu dong duoc tich
steps: Tich vao node cha 'Van ban den'
testcases.expected: Tat ca node con cua 'Van ban den' (Danh sach, Tiep nhan, ...) tu dong duoc tich

testcases.title: Luu phan quyen thanh cong
testcases.preconditions: Drawer Phan quyen mo, da chon mot so quyen
testcases.expected: Drawer dong, message 'Luu phan quyen thanh cong'

testcases.title: Mo lai Drawer -> quyen da gan tich san
testcases.expected: Cac quyen da gan duoc tich san trong cay

testcases.title: Trong qua trinh tai -> hien icon loading o giua
steps: Quan sat khi Drawer dang tai
testcases.expected: Hien spinner / icon loading o giua noi dung

testcases.title: Bo tat ca quyen -> luu OK, nhom rong quyen
testcases.preconditions: Nhom co quyen, Drawer Phan quyen mo
testcases.expected: Luu OK. Mo lai thay khong co quyen nao tich

testcases.title: Xoa nhom quyen khong co nguoi dung -> thanh cong
testcases.preconditions: Nhom quyen 'Test' co So nguoi dung = 0
testcases.expected: Message 'Xoa thanh cong'. Nhom bien mat khoi bang

testcases.title: Xoa nhom co nguoi dung -> 'Khong the xoa: con N nhan vien trong nhom quyen nay'
testcases.expected: Loi: 'Khong the xoa: con 3 nhan vien trong nhom quyen nay'

testcases.title: Click Huy modal -> dong, khong xoa
testcases.expected: Modal dong, nhom van ton tai

testcases.title: User khong admin -> khong vao duoc Quan tri > Nhom quyen
testcases.expected: An menu / redirect 403

testcases.title: User co nhieu nhom quyen -> tong hop quyen union
testcases.preconditions: User A co nhom 'Van thu' (quyen Van ban den) va 'Lanh dao' (quyen Duyet van ban)
steps: Quan sat menu va chuc nang
